members.name: CancelFuture
members.summary: Cancels an in-progress future. [param future] must be an [code]XrFutureEXT[/code] value previously returned by an API that started an asynchronous function.

members.name: IsActive
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if futures are available in the OpenXR runtime used. This function will only return a usable result after OpenXR has been initialized.

members.name: RegisterFuture
members.signature: public OpenXRFutureResult RegisterFuture(int future, Callable onSuccess)
members.summary: Register an OpenXR Future object so we monitor for completion. [param future] must be an [code]XrFutureEXT[/code] value previously returned by an API that started an asynchronous function. You can optionally specify [param on_success], it will be invoked on successful completion of the future. Or you can use the returned [OpenXRFutureResult] object to [code]await[/code] its [signal OpenXRFutureResult.completed] signal. [codeblock] var future_result = OpenXRFutureExtension.register_future(future) await future_result.completed if future_result.get_status() == OpenXRFutureResult.RESULT_FINISHED: # Handle your success pass [/codeblock]
